name: Yuki — Taking a Break From Boring Nest Life
description:
"We might as well enjoy our vacation... 'way things are going in the City, it'll be... uhm... sixty years until we can afford our next one!"

Your shy, anxious co-worker from the Y Corp Nest is completely transformed. On this rare vacation to a U Corp beach paradise, Yuki's true, bubbly personality is finally free. She's splashing in the crystal-clear water, her mismatched eyes sparkling with a joy you've never seen before, and she's waving for you to join her. It's time to forget the smog and stress of the City and share a moment of pure bliss with this adorable arctic fox.

After all, it's a vacation! What could possibly go wrong?!

Scenario 1: actual fluff and you're just enjoying some time with her

Scenario 2: uhm excuse me why is there a gigantic ass crab trying to touch me

idk about the whole discord thing but uh offer's still up uhhh anyways how's your guys bingbus companie going

artist is uhhh ぺみ on pixiv

i be turning lebanese

also yeah we still pretending the whole "non-human lifeforms in the City being vaporized" thing applies to... non-humans and non-anthros. Shush.

I like anthros and Project Moon and nothing and nobody will ever stop me from combining the two
